DESCRIPTION.en: Start with 25 extra sun in the bank!

DESCRIPTION.zh: 可额外持有一枚叶绿素！

DESCRIPTION.en: Fully repair damaged defensive plants by planting on top of them.
DESCRIPTION.zh: 使一株受损的防御植物完全恢复。

DESCRIPTION.en: Instantly refresh a seed packet by dragging and dropping Plant Food on it.
DESCRIPTION.zh: 可以对正在冷却的卡槽使用叶绿素，使之迅速结束冷却。

DESCRIPTION.en: Get an additional 25% of sun cost back when shoveling up plants!
DESCRIPTION.zh: 铲除植物时掉落的阳光增加了其花费的 25% ！

DESCRIPTION.en: Lets you choose another plant type every level!
DESCRIPTION.zh: 在游戏开始前能额外选择一种植物！

This'll buy me a thing or two!
